apply: Students will be able to calculate the number of permutations and combinations for a given problem.
Students will be able to apply the formula for permutation and combination to solve real-life problems.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the situation to decide whether to use permutation or combination.
Students will be able to analyze the data to find the number of permutations and combinations.
remember: Students will be able to recall and list the formulas for permutation and combination.
Students will be able to recall and apply the formula for permutation and combination.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of permutation and combination.
Students will be able to understand the difference between permutation and combination.

ncert_objectives: To understand the basic concepts of permutation and combination.
To apply the formula for permutation and combination to solve problems.
To differentiate between permutation and combination.
board_exam_objectives: To calculate the number of permutations of n distinct items taken r at a time.
To calculate the number of combinations of n distinct items taken r at a time.
To solve problems involving permutation and combination.
